issue_summary: Changed default seeding for MersenneTwister, WELL generators to add system identity hash code. JIRA: .
javadoc_before:
/** Creates a new random number generator. *

The instance is initialized using the current time as the * seed.

*/
javadoc_after:
/** Creates a new random number generator. *

The instance is initialized using the current time plus the * system identity hash code of this instance as the seed.

*/
